note: ChromoFold native query engine — GPU-resident, random-access, searchable compression for LLM data. Composes ON TOP OF quantization (lossless entropy + index layer, not a quantizer). No telemetry, no license server, no network I/O in the core.
positioning: complementary, opt-in, OFF by default. Land only the net-new column (GPU entropy+random-access layer, compressed-domain FM-index search, .cfold container). Does NOT replace sovereign-os kv/quant/compress/moe reference controllers.

honest_degrade.offline_guarantee: no network I/O in compress -> access -> save; a contract to TEST (assert no network syscalls), not a claim to print

abi_contract.device_native: all view pointers are DEVICE pointers; queries run on the caller's stream (void* cudaStream_t, NULL = default); no host allocation, no implicit synchronization, no PCIe round trip
abi_contract.views_repr_c: cf_wavelet_view / cf_rrrw_view / cf_fm_view are POD, #[repr(C)]-safe, passed by value
abi_contract.null_arg_contract: every entry point returns CF_ERR_INVALID_ARGUMENT on a NULL required pointer BEFORE any CUDA call (the seam a no-GPU CI validates)

capabilities.desc: fused decode + embedding gather (no decompressed token buffer)
entropy-sized RRR self-index access (BWT below H0)
FM-index backward-search count in the compressed domain — the net-new capability with NO analogue in a plain KV/quant stack

reference_fixtures.desc: frozen packed-wavelet index + golden access output (Warp reference vector)
RRR-backed wavelet reference (BWT'd stream) + golden access/rank

header_seam: each fixture begins with a 4-byte ASCII magic + u32 little-endian version; packaging/seam_check.c validates this without a GPU (the .cfold-header pure seam)
